html:
Exclusive to:

Tall Scotch Eggs are a meat food added in Don't Starve Together. It is prepared in a Crock Pot with at least 1 Tallbird Egg and a Vegetable value of at least 1.0. The priority of this dish in the crock pot is 10.

Tall Scotch Eggs boast an extremely efficient recipe in terms of extenuating Hunger and Health from their ingredients and can completely fill the belly of most characters. The massive amount of Health it restores, as well as its relatively easy to come by ingredients and decent spoilage time make it an excellent meal to bring into fierce battles. Its cheapest recipes can increase the components' hunger value by almost 300%. Tallbird Eggs also never spoil, so they can be hoarded and stored in preparation to make Tall Scotch Eggs for dangerous situations later.

Recipe

x1

x1.0

×2

Examples

×2

Tips

  • Seasoning Tall Scotch Eggs with Seasoning Salt is one of the most efficient uses of Salt Crystals due to the meal's innately high healing ability. Each Salty Tall Scotch Egg will heal 75 Health, in comparison to Salty Pierogi, which heals 50 Health each.

Trivia

  • Tall Scotch Eggs are based on Scotch eggs, a real-life dish consisting of boiled eggs wrapped in sausage meat. Interestingly, Tall Scotch Eggs do not require any Meats to cook, even though Wendy's and Wanda's examination quotes confirm that they do still contain sausage.
    • Since all Tallbird Eggs are capable of hatching, the meat may come from the unhatched Tallbird inside the egg (further supported by the fact that an overheating Hatching Tallbird Egg drops a Cooked Morsel).
By TypeBy Crock Pot Value

–Wanda

'''Tall Scotch Eggs''' are a [[meat]] [[food]] added in ''[[Don't Starve Together]]''. It is prepared in a [[Crock Pot]] with at least 1 [[Tallbird Egg/DST|Tallbird Egg]] and a [[Vegetable]] value of at least 1.0. The priority of this dish in the crock pot is 10.

Tall Scotch Eggs boast an extremely efficient recipe in terms of extenuating Hunger and Health from their ingredients and can completely fill the belly of most characters. The massive amount of Health it restores, as well as its relatively easy to come by ingredients and decent spoilage time make it an excellent meal to bring into fierce battles. Its cheapest recipes can increase the components' hunger value by almost 300%. Tallbird Eggs also never spoil, so they can be hoarded and stored in preparation to make Tall Scotch Eggs for dangerous situations later.

=={{pic32|Prototype}} Tips==
* [[Seasonings|Seasoning]] Tall Scotch Eggs with [[Seasoning Salt]] is one of the most efficient uses of Salt Crystals due to the meal's innately high healing ability. Each Salty Tall Scotch Egg will heal 75 Health, in comparison to Salty [[Pierogi/DST|Pierogi]], which heals 50 Health each.

=={{pic32|Placeholder}} Trivia==
* Tall Scotch Eggs are based on [[Wikipedia:Scotch_egg|Scotch eggs]], a real-life dish consisting of boiled eggs wrapped in sausage meat. Interestingly, Tall Scotch Eggs do not require any [[Meats|Meats]] to cook, even though [[Wendy|Wendy's]] and [[Wanda|Wanda's]] examination quotes confirm that they do still contain sausage. 
** Since all Tallbird Eggs are capable of hatching, the meat may come from the unhatched Tallbird inside the egg (further supported by the fact that an overheating [[Hatching Tallbird Egg]] drops a [[Cooked Morsel]]).
